description: Unique numeric identifier for each country (1 to 54).
Full official name of the African country.
ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 three-letter country code (e.g. DZA - AGO - KEN).
Name of the country's capital city.
African sub-region classification (e.g. Northern Africa - Western Africa).
Geographic latitude coordinate of the country's centroid (decimal degrees).
Geographic longitude coordinate of the country's centroid (decimal degrees).
Indicates whether the country is landlocked (TRUE) or has coastal access (FALSE).
Total land area of the country in square kilometers.
Estimated total population of the country.
